# metacortex.engineer

> Dr Alexander Mikhalev - Technology Leader & Innovation Architect

## About

Systems thinker with 20+ years in engineering, academic, and leadership positions. Pioneering the convergence of AI, ethics, systems engineering, and enterprise architecture.

## Core Projects

- **Terraphim AI** (https://terraphim.ai) - Privacy-first deterministic AI assistant built with Rust. Knowledge graph learning systems, Aho-Corasick text matching, multi-agent orchestration, MCP server integration.
- **The Pattern** (https://github.com/applied-knowledge-systems/the-pattern) - Machine Learning NLP pipeline for knowledge discovery using Redis ecosystem with VR/AR interfaces.
- **TruthForge** - Bias detection and narrative intelligence platform for responsible AI validation.

## Skills

- AI & Data Science: NLP, Machine Learning, Knowledge Graphs, Deep Learning
- Systems: Distributed Systems, Redis, Enterprise Architecture, Cyber-Physical Systems
- Languages: Python, Rust, Graph Databases, VR/AR Development
- Specialisations: Data Privacy, Synthetic Data, AI Ethics, Sensor Networks

## Content

- Blog: https://metacortex.engineer/post/ - Articles on AI, NLP, Redis, knowledge graphs, systems engineering
- Talks: https://metacortex.engineer/talks/ - Conference presentations (EuroPython, RedisConf, INCOSE)
- Publications: https://metacortex.engineer/publications - Patent and academic publications

## Technical Stack

This site is built with Astro 5.x, deployed on Cloudflare R2 via a Worker router. No frameworks, vanilla CSS only.

## Contact

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexmikhalev/
